subcodes.first_line: We have sent down the Book and revealed that which was hidden in the knowledge of God, the Lord of Religions. We, verily, make mention [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد انزلنا الکتاب و اظهرنا ما هو المستور فی علم الله مالک الادیان انا ذکرنا
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @firmness in the Covenant, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @wisdom [hikmat], @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision
